---
title: "Research Projects"
---

[PAGE UNDER CONSTRUCTION]

<div class="project-card">
  <img src="img/swifts-1.jpg" alt="Alpine swift">
  <h3><a href="projects/sexual_dimorphism.qmd">Evolutionary Causes & Consequences of Sexual Dimorphism</a></h3>
  <p>Work undertaken in the context of my PhD and Postdoc in collaboration with Julien Martin & Pierre Bize. </p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <img src="img/swifts-2.jpg" alt="Alpine swift">
  <h3><a href="projects/spatial_population_structure.qmd">Using Behavioural Strategies to Define Spatial Population Structures</a></h3>
  <p>Work undertaken in the context of a Postdoc in collaboration with Glen Brown, Jeff Brown, Stephanie Blain.</p>
</div>
